title: First Blog Post
content: Welcome to my website. I haven’t filled it all out yet, however I will continue to work on it over time.

title: About
content:
About#Personal Summary#🖥️ I am currently a software engineer working in industry on high-integrity software.
🔬 I was formerly a PhD student and researched topics such as: internet of things, complex event processing, machine learning, and fault tolerance.
🧸 I remain active in research projects and software development in my spare time. I am particularly interested in the theory and praxis of the Web of Things and related standards and protocols.
🧶 I have a variety of hobbies: baking, crocheting, numismatics, beer brewing, among others.
Profiles#You can find me here:
 GitHub Kaggle Hackster

title: Cat Hats
content:
😸 Cat Hats 😸#In 2021, I started to crochet hats for cats with the ambition to make the cats of the world look as dashing as possible. I have only made a few so far but I am eager to send more hats worldwide 🌍. Below are the cats that have been subjected to my creations so far.
Queso
Mexico, 2021Don Corleone
Russia, 2021Luna
England, 2021
